title: PR-6 feat(templates): demo URLs in beauty/service follow-ups + randomised beauty
body:
DEL A from the go-live request.

## Closed gaps

1. **Beauty demos re-added (regression)** — `DEMO_URLS.beautySalon` + `DEMO_URLS.beautyBarber` existed in Lucas's local mods but never reached origin/main. `pickBeautyDemoOrder()` returns randomised primary/secondary so batches don't repeat.
2. **beauty.cold + beauty.followup** — both now render the two URLs in body with humble framing.
3. **service.followup** — routes through `pickCraftDemo(branch+name)` so VVS/elektriker service-bucket leads land on ktvvs and others on denlillemaler.

## Sample previews (followup, rendered via tsx)

- Frisør / Salon Sofie / Give → `salon-artec` + `streetcut` (randomised order)
- VVS-installatør / Byens VVS Struer ApS → `ktvvs.vercel.app/`
- Café / Cafe Kysten / Strandby → `under-klippen` + `zaytoon-six`

All three include the humble "et eksempel jeg lavede" / "demoerne til inspiration" framing, opt-out line, and "send mockup"/"ja" low-friction CTA. No price talk.

## Safety

Halt-flag `2026-07-01T00:00:00.000Z` verified before AND after. tsc clean. next build green. Templates inert until master halt cleared.
head: feat/followup-demos
